---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement for Confluence Studio
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation
What design or analysis question is hard to answer with Confluence Studio today?
Who is affected (early-design architect, MEP engineer, sustainability consultant, researcher, student)?

## Proposed solution
Describe the change you'd like to see. Sketches, mockups, or pseudo-formulas are welcome.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you weighed and why you'd prefer the proposal above.

## Impact on the existing model
Does this change any of the assumptions documented in `docs/FUNCTIONAL_SPEC.md`
or the example scenarios in `examples/scenarios.json`? If so, how?

## Additional context
Links to references, standards (ASHRAE, IBPSA, FEMA, etc.), prior art, or related issues.
